name: Sidebar navigation links open pages without errors
description: After login, clicking three representative sidebar links (one from Study, one from My Room, one top-level) navigates to valid pages that render their heading — not a 404 or blank screen. This confirms the sidebar accordion and routing are functional.

planSteps.description: Log in with valid credentials and wait for the dashboard to load
If a tour or onboarding popup appears, dismiss it
Click the 'Feynman Mode' link inside the Study section of the left sidebar
Verify the Feynman Mode page loaded — it shows a heading or topic selector, not a 404 or blank page
Click the 'Pixel Room' link inside the My Room section of the left sidebar
Verify the Pixel Room page loaded — it shows a pet sprite or mission list or room content, not a 404 or blank page
Click the 'Settings' link in the left sidebar
Verify the Settings page loaded — it shows tabs or a settings form, not a 404 or blank page
